mapper.select: SELECT d.id FROM cs_auth.sys_dept d INNER JOIN cs_auth.sys_user_dept ud ON d.id = ud.dept_id WHERE ud.user_id = #{userId} AND d.deleted_at IS NULL

WITH RECURSIVE subtree AS ( SELECT id FROM cs_auth.sys_dept WHERE id = #{deptId} AND deleted_at IS NULL UNION ALL SELECT d.id FROM cs_auth.sys_dept d INNER JOIN subtree s ON d.parent_id = s.id WHERE d.deleted_at IS NULL ) SELECT id FROM subtree
SELECT jsonb_array_elements_text(custom_dept_ids)::BIGINT AS dept_id FROM cs_auth.sys_role_data_scope WHERE role_id = #{roleId} AND scope_type = 'CUSTOM_DEPT'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cs_auth.sys_user_dept (user_id, dept_id, is_primary) VALUES (#{userId}, #{deptId}, #{isPrimary}) ON CONFLICT (user_id, dept_id) DO NOTHING
